allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:PATH -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "node" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\fnm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null)
